name: Dill Yeast Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fresh dill weed, dill seed
1/2 teaspoon margarine (Fleischmann's fat-free), brush on after baking
recipeInstructions:
1. Have eggs at room temperature.
2. Heat the cottage cheese until barely warm to touch, about 110 degrees.
3. Mix the cottage cheese with sugar, onion flakes, dill weed/dill seed, salt, baking soda, and egg beaters in a large bowl.
4. Add flour, 1/2 cup at a time, to make a stiff batter. Beat well after each addition using an electric mixer or flat beater, or mix by hand with a wooden spoon.
5. Cover the dough with plastic wrap and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour or more.
6. Remove the plastic wrap and stir down the batter with 20-25 strong strokes.
7. Spoon the batter into a greased 1-1/2 quart casserole dish. Cover with wax paper and leave until the batter doubles in size, about 45 minutes.
8. Keep the wax paper from touching the batter or it may collapse when pulled away.
9. Bake in a preheated 350-degree oven for 40-45 minutes or until deep brown and crusty. If necessary, bake an additional 5-8 minutes.
10. Remove bread from oven and brush with margarine. Sprinkle with salt if desired. Coarse salt can be used as an interesting variation.
